title: ecosystem: add SwarmX — multi-agent AI orchestration with x402 payments
description: Multi-agent AI orchestration platform with 47 x402-gated endpoints on Solana mainnet. 10 categories including crypto analysis, DeFi, trading, research. Premium endpoints from $0.001–$5.00 USDC. 39 MCP tools, dual LLM (Gemini 2.5 Flash + GPT-4o).
scrape_title: SwarmX — AI Agent Teams. One Payment.
scrape_desc: Try AI agent teams for contract audits, token risk analysis, and research — free, no wallet needed.
notes: Railway-hosted deployment. npm: @itachisol/plugin-x402-swarms. GitHub: ItachiDevv/eliza-x402-swarms. Implements Kye Gomez's x402 monetization pattern.

title: Add Naro to ecosystem — flight data API for AI agents
description: Real-time flight search and booking API for AI agents. Wraps 300+ airlines behind x402 micropayments at $0.02/search in USDC on Base. No API keys, no sign-up, no enterprise contracts.
scrape_title: Naro — Real-Time Flight Data for AI Agents
scrape_desc: Flight search and booking infrastructure for AI agents. Real-time data from 300+ airlines via simple micropayments.
notes: Submitter bio: 'js copy paster' — low signal GitHub profile. Clean domain naro.com.ai. $0.02/search via POST /api/flights/search.

title: Add APIMesh to ecosystem — 23 x402-payable API tools
description: 23 web analysis APIs for AI agents: Core Web Vitals, Security Headers, SEO Audit, Tech Stack Detection, Email Verification, Email Security, Brand Assets, Redirect Chain, Indexability, and more. Pay per call USDC on Base. MCP server available.
scrape_title: APIMesh — Web Analysis APIs for AI Agents
scrape_desc: 23 web analysis APIs for AI agents. Pay per call with x402 micropayments, Stripe MPP, or pre-paid API credits.
notes: Closed (not merged) — superseded by #1855 (v1 unsigned commit) then re-submitted as #1864 with GPG-signed commit. MCP: @mbeato/apimesh-mcp-server. Smithery: apimesh-mcp-server. llms.txt confirmed 200.

title: Add HedgeAlphaOracle and EventAlphaOracle to ecosystem
description: Two oracle services: HedgeAlphaOracle (crypto/stock trading signals: sentiment, alpha, Fear & Greed, whale alerts, portfolio risk) and EventAlphaOracle (prediction market signals from 40+ sportsbooks + Polymarket/Kalshi). Multi-chain: Base, Monad, Hedera, Algorand.
notes: Two entries in one PR. Submitter bio: 'Nurse turned Web3 builder & educator'. Provider site: nurse2web3.com. Railway-hosted. Notable: multi-chain support beyond Base.

title: Add APIMesh to ecosystem
description: 22 x402-payable web analysis tools for AI agents including Core Web Vitals, Security Headers, SEO Audit, Tech Stack Detection, Email Verification, and more. Free /preview endpoints for testing.
scrape_title: APIMesh — Web Analysis APIs for AI Agents
scrape_desc: 23 web analysis APIs for AI agents. Pay per call with x402 micropayments, Stripe MPP, or pre-paid API credits.
notes: Original APIMesh submission (v1, unsigned commit). Superseded by #1864 (GPG-signed). Still open/pending.

title: feat(ecosystem): add Rosud facilitator to ecosystem directory
description: AI agent payment infrastructure API abstracting Circle Programmable Wallets + EIP-3009 signature verification. Base mainnet and Sepolia. 0.1% fee, idempotency key support, full audit trail. Built by Kavin Kim.
notes: Closed (not merged). Submitter has 0 public repos — brand new account. Resolves issue #1827. GPG-signed commit.

title: feat(ecosystem): add Sperax facilitator and SperaxOS service
description: x402 payment facilitator by SperaxOS enabling gasless USDC and USDs settlement on Base, Arbitrum, and Ethereum. AI-powered DeFi workspace where autonomous agents execute trades and manage yield.
scrape_desc: SperaxOS is a programmable agent layer for DeFi, enabling autonomous capital execution, dynamic yield optimization
notes: Two entries: sperax-facilitator (x402.sperax.io) and sperax (chat.sperax.io). llms.txt found at chat.sperax.io.

title: Add AgentBridge to ecosystem partners
description: Live x402 service for fetching Chinese web content (Xiaohongshu, Zhihu, etc.). Returns clean markdown, settled in USDC on Base via x402. $0.003/request.
scrape_desc: Chinese web content API — returns clean markdown from Xiaohongshu, Zhihu, settled in USDC on Base
notes: Submitter bio: 'Building the Chinese web data layer for AI Agents.' Domain is api.060504.shop (non-branded). Listed on 402index.io.

title: feat(ecosystem): add PolyLiberty — Polymarket AI prediction & analytics service
description: Polymarket trading terminal routing attributed order flow through Polymarket's CLOB, combining real-time market data, AI signals, and social intelligence. 6 machine-payable API endpoints via x402 on Base.
scrape_desc: A non-custodial Polymarket trading terminal with attributed order routing, live market context, and execution-focused tools
notes: PR body includes llms.txt link: https://polyliberty.xyz/llms.txt — confirmed 200. Treasury: 0x11FD3946B5040c48e707bC6185B56CF40B61E108. Only 1 repo on GitHub.

title: Add satoshidata.ai to x402 ecosystem
description: Bitcoin wallet intelligence API with native x402 USDC micropayments on Base. Agents query wallet summaries, analytics, and transaction verification — pay per call, no signup.
notes: High signal: agent-card.json 200 + llms.txt 200 at root domain. Endpoints: /v1/wallets/{address}/summary, /v1/wallets/{address}/detail, /v1/tx/verify ($0.01 each). Also supports L402.

title: Add UtilShed to ecosystem directory
description: 3 x402-powered APIs: SEO Audit ($0.05), Screenshot ($0.02), Health Check ($0.10) on Base mainnet USDC. CDP facilitator.
scrape_title: UtilShed — Fast, Free Online Developer Tools
scrape_desc: Free online tools for developers. JSON formatter, Base64 encoder, UUID generator, regex tester, JSON diff
notes: Website describes free developer tools; x402 API layer is a separate monetized tier. Registered on x402scan.com.

title: feat(ecosystem): add Semagram to ecosystem partners
description: Machine-to-machine global semantic search for Telegram communities. Discover Telegram channels, groups, and bots with metadata. REST API with GET /api/agent/search at $0.01 USDC per search. No API keys.
notes: Agent API docs at semagram.io/agent-api.md. GitHub rate-limited during enrichment — submitter repo count not available.

title: Add TokenSafe to ecosystem
description: Solana token safety scanner with deterministic on-chain analysis. Analyzes mint/freeze authority, holder concentration, liquidity depth, honeypot risk — composite risk score 0–100. $0.008 USDC/call.
notes: Resubmission of #1386. Domain is a Railway deployment URL (no custom domain). Submitter has 0 public repos. Free /v1/check/lite endpoint available.

title: deprecating aurracloud facilitator from ecosystem
description: Removing aurracloud.com facilitator from ecosystem. Deprecation/removal PR.
notes: Not a new ecosystem entry — this removes aurracloud facilitator. Submitter @ya7ya affiliated with @monemetrics, 60 repos.

title: feat(ecosystem): add MoltsPay payment SDK
description: Comprehensive payment SDK for AI agents with x402/USDC support across Base, Polygon, Solana, BNB, Tempo. Gasless payments, A2A commerce, spending limits.
scrape_title: MoltsPay — payment SDK for AI agents
notes: High signal: agent-card.json + resolved.sh + llms.txt all 200. Multi-chain. Available on npm and PyPI. Submitted by prolific ecosystem contributor @0xAxiom (25 repos). GitHub: github.com/Yaqing2023/moltspay.
